events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario describes a shield grounded both ends creating a ground loop in instrumentation wiring. This is a defect - shields should typically be grounded at one end only to prevent ground loops. This was found during testing/inspection. This is non-compliant and installed-defective.

  "rationale": "Grounding a shield at both ends creates a ground loop, introducing noise and potential signal offset in instrumentation circuits. Loop drawings and ISA 5.1 practice require single-point shield grounding. Since this was found at the tested/inspected stage, the work is non-compliant and must be corrected before acceptance.",
